description: A customer claims they only received 9 out of 10 pallets, but the carrier's POD is signed clean.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the signed POD for the shipment in question.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up the POD image, which shows no notes of shortage.

nodes.task_description: Contact the carrier and ask them to investigate the shortage with their driver.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent formally requests an investigation from the carrier.

nodes.task_description: Review the warehouse's loading photos or videos for the shipment, if available.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews security footage, which confirms all 10 pallets were loaded onto the truck.

nodes.task_description: Present the evidence to the carrier to support a freight claim for the missing pallet.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent uses the evidence to file a successful claim.
